title: epacris racemosa
intro: Epacris racemosa, also known as the native mountain frill, is a species of flowering plant in the family Epacridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epacris racemosa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Epacris racemosa typically involve the plant's leaves and flowers being made into infusions or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
